We offer a range of RF connectors, including the **3.5mm Connector** and the **C4 Connector** (available in both male and female versions).

For full specifications and detailed information on these products, please refer to our product pages:

- 3.5mm Connector: https://www.rfconnector.in/product_showroom/35mm_connector
- C4 Connector: https://www.rfconnector.in/product_showroom/c4_connector

For a complete overview of our product line, our full catalog is available at: http://www.rfconnector.in/catalog/Group_Data_Sheet/Full_Line_Catalog.pdf

We offer a range of RF connectors, including the **3.5mm Connector** and the **C4 Connector** (available in both male and female versions).

For full specifications and detailed information, please refer to our product pages:

- 3.5mm Connector: https://www.rfconnector.in/product_showroom/35mm_connector
- C4 Connector: https://www.rfconnector.in/product_showroom/c4_connector

For a complete overview of our product line, our full catalog is available at: http://www.rfconnector.in/catalog/Group_Data_Sheet/Full_Line_Catalog.pdf

We offer a range of cable assemblies, including both customizable and pre-configured options.

**Custom Cable Assembly**
We provide a Custom RF Cable Assembly Configurator, allowing you to specify End 1 Connector, Cable, and End 2 Connector to build a solution tailored to your needs. You can access this tool here: https://www.panaceaticsynergy.com/cable-creator

**Pre-Configured Cable Assemblies**
We also offer a variety of standard cable assemblies, including:
- **AISG RET Control Cables** (e.g., AISG Female to DB9 Male, DIN Male to DIN Female, and DIN Male to DIN Female DIN Male splitters)
- **SMA to SMA Cables** (DC to 18 GHz), available in straight and right-angle configurations and various lengths (0.5 m, 1 m, 2 m, 3 m)
- **SMA to TNC Cables**

For a complete listing, please visit our cable assembly page: https://www.rfconnector.in/product_showroom/cable_assembly
